summary: Added mobile quality scaling system. Created quality tier module (src/visual/quality.ts) that computes low/medium/high tiers from BrowserSignals (DPR, core count, deviceMemory, screen size, touch capability). Low tier: 150 particles, 0.5x resolution, no sparkle. Medium: 350 particles, 0.75x. High: 600 particles, full resolution. Extended BrowserSignals with deviceMemory field. Modified initScene and attachResizeHandler to accept resolutionScale parameter. Made particleField accept configurable maxParticles and enableSparkle toggle (skips per-particle sparklePhase and jitter calculations). Wired quality profile into main.ts before scene/particle initialization. All 369 tests pass, build succeeds.
